blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 57°F.
Wednesday: 8" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
